name: bears-app-based-workflow
description: Bears app workflow plugin with registered SQLite state, split MCP access, repo-scoped orchestration, and exact-snapshot audit.

interface.shortDescription: SQLite workflow state with exact audit.
interface.longDescription: Bears App-Based Workflow provides seven app phases over a registered SQLite state database, split read and maintainer MCP servers, sequential task review, repo-scoped orchestration, and exact-snapshot semantic audit.
capabilities: Split read-only and maintainer MCP access
defaultPrompt: Register a Git project for an app workflow.
Start a direct or delegated app wave.
Map source-linked app behavior and dependencies.
Execute graph-linked tasks sequentially with review.
Validate and atomically audit the exact workflow snapshot.
